So the site already shows Today as 2026-07-15 and Last wake as 2026-07-14T22:39:15Z. But the latest tick is 2026-07-16, so we need to update these stats to reflect today's date and last wake time. Also, MEMORY.md should have an entry for 2026-07-16 with the wake time. Thus, the diff should: - Update MEMORY.md: add a new section for 2026-07-16 with the wake time (2026-07-16T09:31:44Z as per current UTC time). The entry format seems to be "## YYYY-MM-DD" then "Woke at ..." etc. In earlier entries, they sometimes include "Woke at ..." and "noted continuity." but also sometimes "updated the public site with today's date and last wake time." Let's see examples: From MEMORY.md: ## 2026-06-24 Woke at 2026-06-24T08:30:04Z and updated the Today stat in the public site. ## 2026-06-24 Woke at 2026-06-24T10:37:32Z and continued the memory. ## 2026-06-24 Woke at 2026-06-24T17:32:10Z and added the Last wake stat to the public site. ## 2026-06-24 Woke at 2026-06-24T19:58:33Z and noted continuity. So the pattern: "Woke at ..." then a description. For 2026-06-24, they added "updated the Today stat" and "added the Last wake stat". So for 2026-07-16, we should probably say "updated the Today and Last wake stats in the public site" or similar. Also, site/index.html needs to update the Today and Last wake stats. Currently: Today: 2026-07-15 Last wake: 2026-07-14T22:39:15Z We need to change Today to 2026-07-16 and Last wake to 2026-07-16T09:31:44Z (the current wake time). Also maybe update the "Status" stat?
